project: DkMath FLT d=3 Alternative Proof by p-adic Valuation

lemmas.name: cube_sub_eq_of_add_eq
lemmas.mathematical_purpose: Transform cubic equation a³+b³=c³ into c³-b³=a³

lemmas.name: coprime_cb_of_eq
lemmas.statement: {a b c : ℕ} (hab : Nat.Coprime a b) (h : a ^ 3 + b ^ 3 = c ^ 3) : Nat.Coprime c b

lemmas.name: exists_prime_factor_cube_diff
lemmas.statement: {c b : ℕ} (hbc : b < c) (hb : 0 < b) (hcop : Nat.Coprime c b) : ∃ q, Nat.Prime q ∧ q ∣ c^3 - b^3 ∧ ¬ q ∣ c - b
lemmas.description: Primitive prime divisor of cubic difference
lemmas.mathematical_purpose: For coprime c>b, there exists prime q dividing c³-b³ but not c-b
lemmas.research_notes: This lemma handles the critical 3-divisibility branching that complicates formal proof

lemmas.name: exists_primitive_prime_factor_d3
lemmas.statement: {a b : ℕ} (hab : Nat.Coprime a b) (hb : 0 < b) (ha : b < a) (hpnd : ¬ 3 ∣ a - b) : ∃ q : ℕ, Nat.Prime q ∧ q ∣ a ^ 3 - b ^ 3 ∧ ¬ q ∣ a - b
lemmas.description: Layer A: Zsigmondy primitive prime factor
lemmas.mathematical_purpose: Provide primitive prime q for lower bound: v_q(a³) ≥ 3
lemmas.role: Guarantee existence of q for padicValNat lower bound

lemmas.name: S0_not_sq_dvd_of_prime_dvd_and_not_dvd_apb
lemmas.statement: {a b q : ℕ} (_ha_pos : 0 < a) (_hb_pos : 0 < b) (_hab_coprime : Nat.Coprime a b) (_hq : Nat.Prime q) (_hS0_dvd : q ∣ S0_nat a b) (_hq_not_apb : ¬ q ∣ a + b) (hq_not_sq : ¬ q ^ 2 ∣ S0_nat a b) : ¬ q ^ 2 ∣ S0_nat a b
lemmas.description: Layer B: Square non-divisibility condition (vacuous wrapper)
lemmas.mathematical_purpose: Accept square non-divisibility as external assumption (counterexample-aware design)
lemmas.warning: General proposition 'q|S0 ∧ ¬q|(a+b) ∧ gcd(a,b)=1 ⟹ ¬q²|S0' is FALSE. Counterexample: a=18, b=1, q=7 (S0=343=7³). See GEisensteinBridge.exists_counterexample_S0_square_resistance
lemmas.design_rationale: Defensive design: instead of proving ¬q²|S0 generally (impossible), accept it as external condition from main theorem

lemmas.name: padicValNat_lower_bound_of_dvd_d3
lemmas.statement: {c q : ℕ} (hc_pos : 0 < c) (hq : Nat.Prime q) (hq_dvd_c : q ∣ c) : 3 ≤ padicValNat q (c ^ 3)
lemmas.mathematical_purpose: From q|c, derive v_q(c³) ≥ 3 using cubic exponent property
lemmas.role: Critical for contradiction: provides lower bound

lemmas.name: padicValNat_upper_bound_d3
lemmas.statement: {a b q : ℕ} (hab_lt : b < a) (ha_pos : 0 < a) (hb_pos : 0 < b) (hq : Nat.Prime q) (hq_dvd : q ∣ a ^ 3 - b ^ 3) (hq_ndiv_diff : ¬ q ∣ a - b) (hq_not_sq : ¬ q ^ 2 ∣ S0_nat a b) : padicValNat q (a ^ 3 - b ^ 3) ≤ 1
lemmas.mathematical_purpose: Combine Cosmic Formula with primitive prime condition to bound p-adic valuation
proof_flow: p-adic multiplicativity: v_q((a-b)·S0) = v_q(a-b) + v_q(S0) = 0 + v_q(S0)
lemmas.role: Critical for contradiction: provides upper bound

lemmas.name: FLT_d3_by_padicValNat
lemmas.statement: {a b c : ℕ} (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c) (hab : Nat.Coprime a b) (hS0_not_sq : ∀ {q : ℕ}, Nat.Prime q → q ∣ c ^ 3 - b ^ 3 → ¬ q ∣ c - b → ¬ q ^ 2 ∣ S0_nat c b) : a ^ 3 + b ^ 3 ≠ c ^ 3
lemmas.description: MAIN THEOREM: FLT d=3 by p-adic valuation
lemmas.mathematical_purpose: Fermat's Last Theorem for d=3 via p-adic lower and upper bounds
lemmas.alternative_proofs: Classic approach via Cosmic Formula + coprimality (see Basic.lean)
lemmas.research_significance: Novel route using Zsigmondy primitive primes + p-adic valuation instead of coprimality

external_modules.purpose: Relative polygonal numbers and square divisibility

definitions.name: S0_nat
definitions.definition: fun (a b : ℕ) => a^2 + a*b + b^2

definitions.name: Nat.Coprime
definitions.definition: fun (a b : ℕ) => Nat.gcd a b = 1
definitions.meaning: Integers a and b are coprime

definitions.name: Nat.Prime
definitions.definition: fun (p : ℕ) => 2 ≤ p ∧ ∀ m, m ∣ p → m = 1 ∨ m = p

axioms.name: Classical.choice
axioms.formal: ∀ {α : Sort u} (p : α → Prop), (∃ x, p x) → {x // p x}
axioms.necessity: Needed for obtaining primitive primes and other witnesses

axioms.name: Quot.sound
axioms.formal: ∀ {α : Sort u} (r : α → α → Prop) {a b : α}, r a b → ⟦a⟧ = ⟦b⟧
axioms.necessity: Needed for quotient constructions in Mathlib foundations

axioms_analysis.assessment: All axioms are ZFC-standard. No additional assumptions for non-constructive reasoning.

research_notes.key_insight_1: Alternative to classical Cosmic Formula + coprimality route
research_notes.key_insight_2: Uses Zsigmondy primitive primes for existence of q
research_notes.key_insight_3: p-adic valuation captures cubic exponent structure precisely
research_notes.counterexample_known: a=18, b=1, q=7: S0=343=7³, so q²|S0 is possible
research_notes.defensive_design: Main theorem accepts hS0_not_sq as external universal assumption
